title: casuarina teres
intro: Casuarina teres, also known as the Australian pine or she-oak, is a plant species in the family Casuarinaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
